title: MATANA 20 Premium White Plastic Dessert Plates with Silver Rim, 18cm / 7 Inch - Elegant & Reusable Small Side Plates, Starter Plates for Weddings, Birthdays, Picnic, BBQ, Parties
features: Elegant Design: Enhance your table setting with these premium white dessert plates featuring a sophisticated silver ridge border, perfect for any occasion.
Durable and Reusable: Made from high-quality, rigid materials, these plates are not only stylish but also sturdy enough to be washed and reused multiple times.
Versatile Use: Ideal for serving appetizers, bread and butter, snacks, side dishes, cookies, pastries, and desserts like cakes, pies, and tarts during tea or coffee time.
Safe and Convenient: BPA-free and dishwasher safe for easy cleanup, though handwashing is recommended to preserve the elegant silver border.
Perfect for Celebrations: Whether it’s a wedding, birthday, party, buffet, catering event, or Christmas celebration, these plates add a touch of elegance to any gathering.
description: Introducing our Premium White Dessert Plates with Silver Ridge Border, the perfect blend of elegance and practicality for any occasion. Measuring 18 cm, these plates are designed to elevate your table setting with their sophisticated silver ridge border and classic white color. Ideal for a variety of uses, they can beautifully present appetizers, bread and butter, snacks, side dishes, cookies, pastries, and desserts like cakes, pies, and tarts. Whether it's tea time or a formal dinner, these plates will make every meal feel special. Crafted from high-quality, rigid materials, these plates are durable and reusable, ensuring long-lasting use for multiple events. They are BPA-free and dishwasher safe, offering convenience and peace of mind. However, to preserve the elegant silver border, we recommend handwashing. Perfect for weddings, birthdays, parties, buffets, catering events, and Christmas celebrations, our Premium White Dessert Plates with Silver Ridge Border add a touch of charm and sophistication to any gathering. Make every occasion memorable with these stunning and versatile plates.
